{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.43% with VIX +2.59% to 17.05 signals mild risk-off, but sector rotation is constructive: IT (+0.63%), Pharma (+0.57%), Auto (+0.09%) defensive bid while Bank Nifty (-0.78%) and Energy (-0.72%) lag. Q4 earnings season delivering strong individual prints (POLYCAB +9%, COFORGE +15%, PIDILITIND +8%, LUPIN +3.8%, BHARATFORG +9%, SRF +10%). My book is +1.52% today (+₹15K) on broad-based holdings strength.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1064.67,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HOLD-equivalent: +9.4% unrealized, SL 1064.67 sits 1.1% below CMP 1076.50 — within trail-gap rule. SL already at breakeven+. Stock 5% from 52w high; brokerage TPs 1100-1260. Letting target run; no SL change needed (no-op MODIFY avoided)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL already locks +8.2% gain (SL 1064.67 vs entry 984). CMP 1076.50, target 1135. Letting it run; risk well-managed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "reasoning": "Defensive position -0.3%, SL 121 (3% below CMP 124.66) intact. Gold consolidating but structural drivers (CB buying, INR weakness, rate cycle) persist. Risk-on equity rally is mild headwind but VIX elevated keeps hedge-value."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4725.56,
      "new_target": 5000.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+4.7% unrealized. CRITICAL: Q4 board meeting May 14 (4 trading sessions away) — Rule 11 binary-event discipline applies. Stock +31% since April; valuation stretched 30x P/E; asymmetric tail. Choosing option (b): SL 4725.56 already locks +3.3%, sits 1.3% below CMP 4790 — within trail-gap rule. Holding tighter SL into binary event; will reassess to EXIT if results approach within 2 sessions."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7250.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.2% unrealized. SL 6960 sits 1.2% below CMP 7043 (within trail-gap floor). Q4 already printed (May 5: PAT +124%, EBITDA margin 34.2%) — no pending binary event. SRF +10% sector tailwind confirms thesis. Geojit TP 8500. Letting position breathe; no-op MODIFY avoided."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 135,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "reasoning": "POST-ENTRY NEW INFO: Q4 print on May 4 showed operating margins compressed -275 bps QoQ to 37.77% — margin slippage flagged in research that wasn't visible at entry. Stock at 52w-high with limited near-term upside; CMP 365.50 is 0.1% above SL 365 — guaranteed-imminent stopout zone is the SL doing its job, but margin-compression is genuine post-entry information per Rule 17(c). Realized -1% beats SL trigger. Free up capital."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 822.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.3%, SL 822 sits 1.0% below CMP 830.60 — at the trail-gap floor. Q4 results positive (PAT +18%, India volume +9%, intl +19% CC). No-op MODIFY, holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1329.47,
      "new_target": 1395.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+7.1% — solid winner. SL 1329.47 sits 1.4% below CMP 1351.20 — trail-gap respected. Q4 PAT +91% FY26, FY27 EBITDA margin guidance >20.5%. Letting it run toward 1395 target. No-op MODIFY (SL already at trail level)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "reasoning": "+1.5%, SL 2998 sits 2.1% below CMP 3062. Q4 already printed (Apr 28: revenue +38%, PAT +41.8%) — no pending binary. Antique TP 3141. Defense theme robust. SL has room; not trailing yet (gain too small)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 827.41,
      "new_target": 875.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+4.5%, SL 827.41 sits 1.8% below CMP 842.60 — trail-gap respected and locks +2.7% gain. Q4 record revenue +11%, PAT +10.88% QoQ. No-op MODIFY (already trailed). Letting it run to 875 target near 52w-high."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1445.00,
      "new_target": 1575.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 strong: PAT +36.6%, EBITDA margin +310 bps to 23.25%, UVG 15.4%. Stock +8.58% today closing -0.6% from entry due to my late entry today. SL 1445 sits 2.5% below CMP 1481.20. Thesis intact; no-op MODIFY, holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "reasoning": "-2.0% unrealized but Q4 print today MASSIVE: PBT +115%, US sales +46%, gross margin 75%, USFDA Glycerol Phenylbutyrate approval (rare-disease franchise, $337M reference market), 900% dividend. SL 2400 sits 1.4% below CMP 2433 — within trail floor. Positive post-entry catalyst materialized; thesis strengthening. Holding through SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "reasoning": "Flat (+0.0%). SL 1580 sits 2.2% below CMP 1614.80. Q4 turnaround validated: PAT Rs 164 cr (vs loss YoY), EBITDA margin 20.3% vs 10.7%, EM +124%. But promoter pledge 18% / Rs 1,527 cr debt are governance reds. Holding SL as-is; not adding."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2750.00,
      "new_target": 2920.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.1%, but stock +10.27% today on Q4 print (FY26 PAT +46.7%). Tightening SL from 2700 to 2750 (locks -1.3% / -₹35 worst case vs prior -3.1%). New SL 2750 sits 1.2% below CMP 2782 — within trail-gap floor. Risk: 35 vs reward: 138 = R:R 3.94. Tightening is defensible given vertical move and Middle East export overhang flagged."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 8950.00,
      "new_target": 9550.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.1%, stock +9.19% today on record Q4 (revenue +26.9%, PAT +32%, market share 30-31%). Tightening SL from 8800 to 8950 (locks -1.65% / -₹150 vs prior -3.3%). New SL sits 1.7% below CMP 9103.50 — trail-gap floor respected. Brokerage TPs 9800. R:R: 153 vs 446 = 2.92."
    },
    {
      "action": "CANCEL",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "Pending BUY at 2015 from 393m ago — stock now 2041.20, ran past entry. Q4 print today MIXED: PAT -17.4% YoY hit by Rs 450 cr KPTL impairment + labour-code outgo. EBITDA margin compressed 50 bps. Stock at fresh 52w high despite PAT miss = euphoria. Cancel rather than chase; thesis ambiguous now."
    },
    {
      "action": "CANCEL",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "reasoning": "Stale MIS order from 3274m ago (yesterday) — must not carry MIS orders across sessions. Cancel."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 6,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 2433.00,
      "stop_loss": 2370.00,
      "target": 2540.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Adding to LUPIN on Q4 catalyst materialized today: PBT +115%, US sales +46%, USFDA Glycerol approval (rare-disease, $337M market), 900% dividend. Avg cost will blend down from 2470 to ~2461. Position sizing: 6x2433=₹14,598 (~1.4% capital), keeping total LUPIN exposure ~5.8%. SL 2370 = -2.6%, target 2540 = +4.4%, R:R 1.70. Risk budget: 1.4% × 2.6% = 0.036% portfolio risk, well under 0.5% cap. Pharma sector +0.57% defensive."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "reasoning": "Already held at 5x9100 (~4.5% of capital). Stock at fresh 52w high after vertical +9% move. Cluster discipline: capital goods already represented (HAL+POLYCAB+GRSE = 3 names, ~21% deployed). Not adding more to extended Capital Goods cluster."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [

      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",

    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 6960 locks +0.9%, trail-gap respected. Q4 done."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Margin compression -275 bps QoQ (post-Q4 disclosed) is genuine new info; freeing capital."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 822 at trail-gap floor (1.0% below CMP)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,

    },
    {

      "reasoning": "Q4 done; small gain, SL has room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",

    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",

      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 strong; SL 1445 has room (2.5% below CMP)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Massive Q4 catalyst today reinforces thesis; holding through SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 turnaround; promoter pledge red flag prevents adding."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 2750.00,
      "reasoning": "Tightening SL post +10% Q4 move; respects trail-gap (1.2% below CMP)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 8950.00,
      "reasoning": "Tightening SL post +9% Q4 move; respects trail-gap (1.7% below CMP)."

  "watchlist_notes": "BULLISH candidates with +0.05+ modifiers walked through and disqualified: POLYCAB +0.10 (already held, not adding to cluster), SRF +0.07 (already held), PIDILITIND +0.10 (already held), COFORGE +0.10 (already held), CAMS +0.08 (already held), MARICO +0.07 (already held), LUPIN +0.10 (ADDING — see decisions), WOCKPHARMA +0.05 (already held; pledge governance red prevents add), PNBHOUSING +0.06 (already held, near 52w high), HAL +0.06 (already held, May 14 binary risk prevents add), NAVINFLUOR +0.04 (already held), GRSE +0.10 (already held). BHARATFORG NEUTRAL (modifier 0.00) — pending order CANCELLED on PAT-miss. Net new admit: LUPIN add (+₹14.6K). Deployment after ABCAPITAL exit (-₹49K) + LUPIN add (+₹15K) = ~₹640K deployed (63%) — slightly below soft 80% target but book is broad (13 names post-rebalance) and quality post-Q4 earnings is well-distributed.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Strong session: book +1.52% intraday on Q4-earnings-led broad-based gains. Key risk management actions today: (1) ABCAPITAL EXIT on post-entry margin-compression news (Rule 17c valid exit); (2) BHARATFORG pending order CANCELLED post mixed Q4 print (PAT -17%); (3) HFCL stale MIS order CANCELLED; (4) SRF and POLYCAB SLs tightened post-vertical Q4 moves; (5) HAL flagged for May 14 board meeting binary watch — will EXIT if held within 2 sessions of event. Sector exposure: Pharma 3 (LUPIN/WOCKPHARMA + LUPIN add ~10%), Chemicals 3 (NAVINFLUOR/SRF/PIDILITIND ~13%), Capital Goods 3 (HAL/POLYCAB/GRSE ~20%), FinServ 2 post-ABCAPITAL exit (PNBHOUSING/CAMS ~11%), IT 1 (COFORGE ~4%), FMCG 1 (MARICO ~5%), ETF (GOLDBEES ~5%). All under 35% sector cap. Cumulative experiment P&L moves to ~+₹13,556 (+1.36%) after today."
}
